svg.title: Logitech G Pro X Superlight — LinguaX slot layout
svg.desc: Top-down photo of the G Pro X Superlight with LinguaX-mappable slots labelled: M wheel click, S1 side button (Back), S2 side button (Forward). The main plates carry L / R main clicks. Recognized via the universal HID engine — no HID++ profile.
svg.text: G Pro X Superlight 1 / 2 — 3 mappable slots (M · S1 · S2) via universal HID engine
